name: IRR: Net Sale Proceeds (1-Year)
short_description: Calculates the Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for a 1-year investment where the year-1 inflow is derived from a sale price minus selling costs.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: The selling price of the asset at the end of Year 1.

inputs.name: sell_cost
inputs.description: The costs associated with selling the asset at the end of Year 1.

name: IRR: After-Tax Exit Gain (1-Year)
short_description: Calculates the Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for a 1-year investment, considering tax on the gain from the sale price minus the initial investment (tax basis).

inputs.name: investment
inputs.description: Initial investment amount, also serving as the tax basis.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: Sale price of the investment after one year.

inputs.name: tax_rate_bp
inputs.description: Tax rate on the gain, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 20 for 20%).

name: IRR: After-Tax Net Sale with Selling Costs (1-year)
short_description: Calculates the 1-year Internal Rate of Return (IRR) after accounting for selling costs and capital gains tax on a single investment sale.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: The price at which the asset is sold.

inputs.name: sell_cost
inputs.description: Costs incurred during the sale of the asset.

inputs.name: tax_rate
inputs.description: The capital gains tax rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.20 for 20%).

name: IRR: Semiannual Coupon Bond with Reinvestment
short_description: Calculates the Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for a 1-year bond with semiannual coupons, where the first coupon is reinvested until maturity.

inputs.name: coupon_rate_bp
inputs.description: Annual coupon rate in basis points (e.g., 5 for 5%).

inputs.name: reinv_rate_bp
inputs.description: Simple annual reinvestment rate for the coupon in basis points (e.g., 3 for 3%).

name: Annualized IRR with Fractional Holding, Selling Costs, and Tax
short_description: Calculates the annualized Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for an investment with a partial-year holding period, including selling costs and capital gains tax on the profit.

inputs.name: months
inputs.description: The holding period of the investment in months.

inputs.name: sale_price
inputs.description: The gross sale price of the investment.

inputs.name: sell_cost
inputs.description: Total selling costs incurred at the time of sale.

inputs.name: tax_rate_bp
inputs.description: The capital gains tax rate in basis points (e.g., 25 for 25%).
